title: Top 5 Utility Stocks to Stay Safe in a Likely Volatile Week
text: We have narrowed our search to five low-beta utility stocks that are regular dividend payers. These are: AEP, AES, NI, NRG and PPL.

title: PPL Corporation: Pricey Safety, It's A 'Hold' Here
text: PPL is a utility - which is a sector I'm fairly fond of investing in. In this case, we're looking at a PA, KY and Rhode-Island based utility. The company has an appealing rate base, a good size and market cap, and provides service to 3.5M customers across its 20,600 square mile service area.

title: These Were the 5 Best and Worst Performing Utilities Stocks in November 2022
text: Investing in utilities stocks is among the best low-risk and long-term investments.
